caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
description: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
narration: And... action. Let's start by opening Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform. Every good walkthrough needs an establishing shot, and this is ours.

caption: Step 2: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
description: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page. A clean jump like this keeps the momentum intact.

caption: Step 3: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
narration: Here comes the payoff shot. We view key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot. It gives us the quick snapshot before we go deeper.

caption: Step 4: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
narration: Quick scene change. We review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance. Now the plot thickens, in the best spreadsheet kind of way.

caption: Step 5: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
narration: Cue the montage. We inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins. This is where the small details quietly become the whole story.

caption: Step 6: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity. One quick check here tells us whether things look solid or stretched.

caption: Step 7: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
description: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
narration: Here comes the payoff shot. We open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters. Every good walkthrough needs an establishing shot, and this is ours.

caption: Step 8: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
description: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
narration: Quick scene change. We open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria. Now the viewer knows exactly where the story starts.

caption: Step 9: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
description: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
narration: Cue the montage. We browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap. This keeps comparison easy without opening every result by hand.

caption: Step 10: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
description: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
narration: Now the camera swings to the next beat. We open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis. Every good walkthrough needs an establishing shot, and this is ours.

caption: Step 11: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
description: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
narration: And that is our closing scene. The flow is captured end to end and ready for a replay. The flow is now captured end to end and ready to replay or adapt.
